7: Wihuwte is seething, but before he can make good on his earlier threat, he is distracted by yelling nearby. He follows the voice a short distance to find a grinning Zekowa, who leads the deputy chief on a merry chase that ends back in Hhusatahwi. He prepares to arrest Zekowa, but in that moment Erenville arrives with a barrel full of the townsfolks' stolen possessions, and subsequently reveals the existence of the bandit's operation to a growing crowd. Accusing the deputy chief of being behind this criminal enterprise, Zekowa challenges Wihuwte to a duel, who is forced to accept. The ensuing altercation is over in the blink of an eye, and Wihuwte falls to the ground defeated.

118: Sorry. I'm still learning my away around.
Sorry. I'm still learning my way around.
